title: Pure Functions, Immutability, and Data Copies · Side-Effect Repair Bay
summary: Repair a pricing pipeline where aliases mutate shared orders during validation. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a pure price transformation with alias-safety tests and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write deterministic pure functions whose outputs and failures depend only on explicit inputs.
Predict mutation through shared aliases in nested Python containers.
Return updated immutable records while preserving unchanged data and input values.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
